description: Target persona matrix for intel page generation. Each persona cross-products with every topic.

personas.name: Competitive FPS Gamers
personas.description: Esports competitors, twitch-shooter players, and reaction-based gaming athletes

personas.description: ATC personnel, aviation safety operators, and flight sequencing specialists

personas.description: Surgical physicians, procedural specialists, and medical operators

personas.description: Combat aviators, military flight crews, and tactical air operators

personas.description: Litigators, trial attorneys, and courtroom advocates

personas.description: Medical imaging specialists, diagnostic radiologists, and imaging analysts
